dialogueLines.dialogueText: You just shot out the whiskey. Great job!
Now, to introduce the mixers. You began this tutorial with the Ginger Ale mixer.
This makes your regular attacks deal less damage and the projectiles you whip back do more damage.
Press Tab to switch to the Apple Cider, which makes you move faster but makes your shots less accurate.
If you don't get this speed boost, you won't be able to get across before you get shot. Good luck!
